risks.title: 'We overcame every obstacle': Tuchel hails England
risks.description: England manager Thomas Tuchel praised his side's "pure mentality and heart" after the 10-man Three Lions survived a thrilling 3-2 win over Mexico at the Azteca Stadium to book a FIFA World Cup quarter-final against Norway.

risks.title: Donald Trump praises Harry Kane as a 'GREAT player' after England's victory over Mexico
risks.description: Captain Harry Kane was England's match-winning hero yet again at the 2026 World Cup - and has now attracted the attention and acclaim of US President Donald Trump.

risks.title: 'He's got that wrong': Thomas Tuchel's post-Mexico interview is torn apart by BBC pundit Joe Hart - after England manager attacked referees and VAR at the World Cup
risks.description: England reached the last 16, where they will play Norway, after two goals from Jude Bellingham and a penalty from Harry Kane - despite right-back Jarell Quansah being sent off at the Estadio Azteca.

risks.title: YWAM mobilizes churches in multi-country outreach as World Cup knockout stage continues
risks.description: International missionary movement Youth With A Mission (YWAM) is running a coordinated outreach campaign across Canada, Mexico, and the United States as the 2026 FIFA World Cup advances through its intense knockout stages.

risks.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup reaches its quarterfinals with historic upsets, including Germany's and Brazil's early exits. Morocco makes history, and the USA is the last co-host standing.

risks.title: Neymar says Brazil career over after Norway defeat

risks.title: 'I leave with a lot of pride': Mexico manager Aguirre bids farewell
risks.description: Mexico manager Javier Aguirre said he was leaving with pride despite the pain of elimination after losing to England in the FIFA World Cup.

risks.title: Okonjo-Iweala hails African teams’ impressive World Cup campaign

risks.title: 'Best Night Of My England Career': Jude Bellingham Not Taking Mexico Win For Granted
risks.description: Jude Bellingham carried England to the World Cup quarterfinals, overcoming a raucous crowd, the elevation of Estadio Azteca and a man disadvantage in the second half to beat Mexico in a 3-2 thriller on Sunday night.

risks.title: 2026 World Cup will be my last tournament, says Cristiano Ronaldo
risks.description:
Cristiano Ronaldo confirms the 2026 World Cup will be his final tournament, expressing his focus on enjoying every moment and leaving with no regrets.

Read More: https://punchng.com/2026-world-cup-will-be-my-last-tournament-says-cristiano-ronaldo/
